caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of dark gray acoustic foam panels. He wears large over-ear headphones and a white t-shirt featuring a logo that reads "Stay Authentic". He is positioned behind a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and reacting. Initially, he has a slight smile and closed mouth, but he quickly opens his mouth wide as if speaking emphatically or expressing surprise. He then shifts his gaze slightly and returns to a smiling expression with his mouth partially open. His right arm, which shows tattoos, is partially visible as it rests near the microphone equipment. The camera angle remains constant, capturing his head and shoulders as his facial expressions change in response to a conversation.
